ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Player's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Player's last name */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., forward, defender) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Player's weight */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that drafted the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* Player's college */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Player's social media handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head coach */,
  "assistant_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assistant coach */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "team_social_media_handle" TEXT /* Team's social media handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the contract */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the contract */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the contract is valid for */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the player for that year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Any performance-based bonuses */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., rookie, veteran) */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uniforms" (
  "uniform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each uniform assignment */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player assigned to this uniform */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the uniform */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Number on the uniform */,
  "jersey_color" TEXT /* Color of the jersey */,
  "jersey_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the jersey */,
  "jersey_size" TEXT /* Size of the jersey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uniform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uniforms_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uniforms_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the salary */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the salary record */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary amount for the player in that year */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Any performance-based bonuses */,
  "salary_type" TEXT /* Type of salary (e.g., base, performance-based) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., direct deposit, check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was established */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Commissioner of the league */,
  "league_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the league's logo */,
  "league_website" TEXT /* URL of the league's official website */,
  "league_social_media_handle" TEXT /* League's social media handle */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is assigned to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player on the roster */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for the roster entry */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, injured, suspended) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Number on the uniform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Coach's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Coach's last name */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the coach (e.g., head coach, assistant coach) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Coach's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Coach's phone number */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Coach's social media handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with this history record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the record */,
  "record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the team */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won in that year */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team was in */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team was in */,
  "playoff_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of playoff appearances */,
  "playoff_record" TEXT /* Playoff win-loss record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_history_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts_history" (
  "contract_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract history record */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract associated with this history record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary amount for the contract in that year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Any performance-based bonuses */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., rookie, veteran) */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_history_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)
